2604.08432.title: Small-scale photonic Kolmogorov-Arnold networks using standard telecom nonlinear modules
2604.08432.paper_summary: Photonic neural networks promise ultrafast inference, yet most architectures rely on linear optical meshes with electronic nonlinearities, reintroducing optical-electrical-optical bottlenecks. Here we introduce small-scale photonic Kolmogorov-Arnold networks (SSP-KANs) implemented entirely with standard telecommunications components. Each network edge employs a trainable nonlinear module composed of a Mach-Zehnder interferometer, semiconductor optical amplifier, and variable optical attenuators, providing a four-parameter transfer function derived from gain saturation and interferometric mixing. Despite this constrained expressivity, SSP-KANs comprising only a few optical modules achieve strong nonlinear inference performance across classification, regression, and image recognition tasks, approaching software baselines with significantly fewer parameters. A four-module network achieves 98.4\% accuracy on nonlinear classification benchmarks inaccessible to linear models. Performance remains robust under realistic hardware impairments, maintaining high accuracy down to 6-bit input resolution and 14 dB signal-to-noise ratio. By using a fully differentiable physics model for end-to-end optimisation of optical parameters, this work establishes a practical pathway from simulation to experimental demonstration of photonic KANs using commodity telecom hardware.
2604.08432.paper_summary_zh: 光子神經網絡承諾超快速推理，但大多數架構依賴於具有電子非線性的線性光學網格，重新引入光電光瓶頸。在這裡，我們介紹了完全使用標準電信元件實現的小型光子Kolmogorov-Arnold網絡（SSP-KANs）。每個網絡邊緣都使用由馬赫-曾德干涉儀、半導體光放大器和可變光衰減器組成的可訓練非線性模塊，提供一個基於增益飽和和干涉混合的四參數轉移函數。儘管這種表達能力受到限制，僅由幾個光學模塊組成的SSP-KAN在分類、回歸和圖像識別任務中實現了強大的非線性推理性能，接近軟件基準，且參數顯著更少。一個四模塊網絡在無法被線性模型訪問的非線性分類基準上達到了98.4\%的準確率。在現實硬體損傷下，性能仍然穩健，保持高準確率直至6位輸入解析度和14 dB信噪比。通過使用完全可微分的物理模型進行光學參數的端到端優化，本研究建立了一條從模擬到使用商品電信硬體實驗演示光子KAN的實用途徑。
2604.08432.author: Luca Nogueira Calçado et.al.
2604.08432.authors: Luca Nogueira Calçado, Sergei K. Turitsyn, Egor Manuylovich
